sub_modules.fp_fir_history_pack: Combinational next-state builder for the FIR sample history shift register.
sub_modules.fp_fir_coeff_rom: Combinational ROM containing the 101 binary32 FIR coefficients.
sub_modules.fp_fir_mac: Combinational binary32 FIR multiply-accumulate evaluator over the flattened sample history.
